events.title: Project inception
events.description: Core idea of representation space traversal as primary AI mechanism first articulated

events.title: Hybrid representation considered and rejected
events.description: Graph backbone + primitive leaf attributes initially chosen, then rejected in s_07 as counter to design philosophy

events.title: Two-system architecture established
events.description: Data system and rewrite system separated, with translation/innovation distinction

events.title: Two-layer library architecture established
events.description: Empirical and reasoned library layers defined with human capability threshold gate

events.title: GitHub MCP connected
events.description: Persistent memory via GitHub MCP established, knowledge base populated

events.title: KB restructured into chunks/ and index/
events.description: Monolithic knowledge_base.json split into per-subtopic files for efficient retrieval

events.title: Base substrate architecture finalised
events.description: Binary edge typing adopted, hyperedges and weights deferred as upgrade paths, Graph Operation Interface defined

events.title: Layer structure corrected and GA fitness signal established
events.description: Layer identity defined as representational scale. GA confirmed as load-bearing for prototype. Fitness signal: label-conditioned reproducibility.

events.title: Prototype roadmap created
events.description: 6-phase roadmap to first testable MNIST run, including minimal GA (Phase 5b)

events.title: Knowledge base refactored to general memory system
events.description: Project-specific content migrated to projects.perspective namespace. General domains kept clean for cross-project use.

milestones.title: Architecture design phase complete (v0.1)
milestones.notes: Core two-system architecture with library established across sessions 1-6

milestones.title: Invariant retention criterion formalised
milestones.notes: Resolved as label-conditioned reproducibility under converged GA rules

milestones.title: Rewrite system fitness signal formalised
milestones.notes: Minimize variance in subgraph output per label across images

milestones.title: First implementation prototype
milestones.notes: Phase 1 of roadmap d_02 not yet started

notes: Merged timeline.events and timeline.milestones into single project timeline. Migrated s_08.
